siteMetadata.name: Caleb Cross
siteMetadata.title: Caleb Cross | Full-Stack Developer
siteMetadata.about:
Self-driven and motivated Full Stack Software Engineer with 4 years of experience implementing pixel perfect UI/UX design systems
and crafting full stack web experiences using React with Next.js and Node.js with Prisma. Recently launched a E-commerce site built
using Next.js and Shopify and led an initiative to bring a website up to WCAG2 standard.

projects.name: UpriseArt
projects.description: Marketing site built with React, Next.js, TailwindCSS and GraphQL API from Contentful and shopify site for a art gallery based in NYC

projects.name: North Park Transportation
projects.description: Marketing and Customer Portal site built for 75 year old trucking company based in Denver, Colorado. Also built company first API for tracking shipments and building shipment agreements/contracts

projects.name: Brightline Health
projects.description: Marketing site built for Healtcare Startup built using React with Next.js and Strapi CMS and API based career site using Greenhouse API

projects.name: Breastcancer.org
projects.description: Marketing site built for Non-profit built using React and TailwindCSS
